name: 2 Tier Garment Rack - Brightroom™: Metal Frame, Black, 72.71" Height, 35 lb Capacity, Closet Clothing Storage Solution
description:
You're sure to love the organization this 2-Tier Garment Rack from Brightroom™ brings to your bedroom or mudroom. This metal garment rack features a two-tier design with two rods for organizing different hangers to help keep your space looking and feeling clean. Plus, it features four casters for easy maneuverability. With a sleek design in a black metal finish, it's sure to blend easily with any existing decor.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
